title: Saddle & Lead Recipe
description: Saddle & Lead Recipe from newer versions of Minecraft for older versions.
body:
## 🧾 Recipes
- This datapack/mod allows you to craft saddle and lead in old version versions of Minecraft.
## 🪜 Advancements
- When you craft a saddle or lead, you will also unlock special advancements.
## 💡 Supported Versions
- ✅ Supports `1.21` ,`1.21.1` for now
- 😊 More versions support will be added soon.
- ✨ Also availiable as mods for `Forge`, `Fabric`, `NeoForge`, `Quilt`
